🛣️ Motor Vehicle Third-Party Premium

Mandatory motor insurance costs per country. What you must legally have to drive.

🛣️ 54 Countries💰 Free

Select your country to get started:

West Africa
🇳🇬Nigeria→🇬🇭Ghana→🇸🇳Senegal→🇨🇮Côte d'Ivoire→🇧🇯Benin→🇧🇫Burkina Faso→🇨🇻Cabo Verde→🇬🇲Gambia→🇬🇳Guinea→🇬🇼Guinea-Bissau→🇱🇷Liberia→🇲🇱Mali→🇲🇷Mauritania→🇳🇪Niger→🇸🇱Sierra Leone→🇹🇬Togo→
East Africa
🇰🇪Kenya→🇹🇿Tanzania→🇺🇬Uganda→🇷🇼Rwanda→🇪🇹Ethiopia→🇧🇮Burundi→🇩🇯Djibouti→🇪🇷Eritrea→🇰🇲Comoros→🇲🇬Madagascar→🇲🇺Mauritius→🇲🇼Malawi→🇸🇨Seychelles→🇸🇴Somalia→🇸🇸South Sudan→
Central Africa
🇨🇲Cameroon→🇦🇴Angola→🇨🇩DR Congo→🇨🇬Congo-Brazzaville→🇨🇫Central African Republic→🇹🇩Chad→🇬🇦Gabon→🇬🇶Equatorial Guinea→🇸🇹São Tomé and Príncipe→
Southern Africa
🇿🇦South Africa→🇧🇼Botswana→🇳🇦Namibia→🇿🇲Zambia→🇿🇼Zimbabwe→🇲🇿Mozambique→🇸🇿Eswatini→🇱🇸Lesotho→
North Africa
🇪🇬Egypt→🇲🇦Morocco→🇹🇳Tunisia→🇩🇿Algeria→🇱🇾Libya→🇸🇩Sudan→
